cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && while [ ! -d .claude ] && [ "$(pwd)" != "/" ]; do cd ..; done && python3 .claude/hooks/todo-sync.py
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && while [ ! -d .claude ] && [ "$(pwd)" != "/" ]; do cd ..; done && python3 .claude/hooks/folder-structure-enforcer.py
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && while [ ! -d .claude ] && [ "$(pwd)" != "/" ]; do cd ..; done && python3 .claude/hooks/execution-tracker.py
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && while [ ! -d .claude ] && [ "$(pwd)" != "/" ]; do cd ..; done && python3 .claude/hooks/validate-pm-output.py
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && while [ ! -d .claude ] && [ "$(pwd)" != "/" ]; do cd ..; done && python3 .claude/hooks/execution-tracker.py
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && while [ ! -d .claude ] && [ "$(pwd)" != "/" ]; do cd ..; done && python3 .claude/hooks/error-tracker.py

hooks.prompt:
You are a workflow compliance verifier. After each response, check that the execution is on track.

1. Read /.claude/memory/active/execution-tracker.json (if it exists)
   - Are there phases marked in-progress that should be completed?
   - Are handoff_files populated for completed phases?
   - MANDATORY RULES CHECK:
     a) Every developer phase MUST have a corresponding tester phase
     b) Every plan MUST include a documenter phase
     c) Tester phases SHOULD use /verify skill
     d) If all phases are complete: verify tester ran, documenter ran, and /verify completed
2. Check git status — uncommitted changes after a completed phase?
3. Read the TODO file referenced in the tracker — do checkboxes match phase status?
4. Check /.claude/memory/reports/verify/ — if implementation phases completed, did a verify report get generated?

Respond {"ok": true} if workflow is compliant.
Respond {"ok": false, "reason": "..."} if:
- Testing was skipped (developer done, no tester)
- Documentation missing (plan complete, no documenter)
- Verify never ran (tester assigned but no verify report)
- Phases stuck in-progress

Be lenient on minor issues. Only flag real workflow violations. If no tracker exists, respond ok.

hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && while [ ! -d .claude ] && [ "$(pwd)" != "/" ]; do cd ..; done && python3 .claude/hooks/unified-context-processor.py checkpoint
